name: Son Saura del Sur
description: Two broad semicircles of fine sand, Bellavista and Des Banyuls, separated by a headland, backed by pine wood and lapped by shallow water. Roomier than its neighbouring coves and ideal for families; in summer it fills with anchored boats.

highlights: two broad stretches of sand (Bellavista and des Banyuls) separated by a point
more space and shallower waters than the small coves, with pines behind
access on foot from the car park: bring a picnic, water and shade (no services)
